title: teucrium lamiifolium subsp. stachyophyllum
intro: Teucrium lamiifolium subsp. stachyophyllum, also known as the Greek germander, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae and is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of iridoids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Teucrium lamiifolium subsp. stachyophyllum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and protect against oxidative stress, among others. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to support various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
